CVE-2016-7944.title: Integer overflow in X.org libXfixes before 5.0.3 on 32-bit platfo ...
CVE-2016-7944.description: Integer overflow in X.org libXfixes before 5.0.3 on 32-bit platforms might allow remote X servers to gain privileges via a length value of INT_MAX, which triggers the client to stop reading data and get out of sync.
